Maria Gonzalez
Backend Lead · Backend Squad API Lead · Platform Squad

Bio
Maria Gonzalez
Backend Lead · Backend Squad & API Lead · Platform Squad
Senior backend engineer and tech lead with 7+ years building high-scale API platforms. At ACME since 2022 — leads Backend Squad and co-leads the Platform API team. MSc Computer Science, Universidad Politécnica de Madrid. AWS certification in progress. Strong record in distributed systems, microservices architecture, and cross-functional technical leadership.
